'''Myntors''' were quadrupedal [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] [[Diet/Legends|carnivores]] native to [[Kothlis/Legends|Kothlis]]. They had long snouts, [[Bone/Legends|bony]] back plates capable of deflecting [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] bolts, and [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] that could poke around the head to see objects. Myntors resided in [[Arblis Forest]].

{{Creature-stub}}
